description: Sector overlay for French agricultural producers, exporters, processors, cooperatives, agribusiness operators, and food-chain documentation.

metadata.scope: France-only sector overlay controls for Agriculture. Intended to be used with france_core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from official French/EU legal, regulatory, supervisory, and guidance sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: DGAL food safety, animal health, and plant health control framework

rules.title: Food-safety or hygiene-control evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for food safety, hygiene package, HACCP, sanitary plan, official controls, or DGAL evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified France compliance/legal reviewer must confirm applicability, current legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: DGAL food safety and hygiene guidance

rules.title: Traceability and batch/lot evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for farm-to-fork traceability, lot, batch, origin, recall, or withdrawal evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified France compliance/legal reviewer must confirm applicability, current legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Animal/plant health or phytosanitary evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for animal health, plant health, veterinary/phytosanitary certificate, disease monitoring, or pest-control evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified France compliance/legal reviewer must confirm applicability, current legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: DGAL animal and plant health framework

rules.title: Consumer-facing labelling or product information evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for product labelling, origin claims, allergens, composition, pricing, or consumer information.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified France compliance/legal reviewer must confirm applicability, current legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
